name: decision-logger
description: > Two-layer memory architecture for tracking executive decisions. Layer 1 stores raw deliberation transcripts, Layer 2 stores founder-approved decisions only. Future sessions read Layer 2 to prevent hallucinated consensus from past debates. Handles conflict detection, supersession tracking, DO_NOT_RESURFACE enforcement, overdue action item alerts, and decision search. Use when logging decisions, reviewing past decisions, checking overdue items, detecting conflicting decisions, or when user menti
author: borghei
summary_zh: 用双层记忆结构记录团队决策：一层存完整讨论过程，另一层只存创始人最终拍板的结论，避免日后翻旧账时把当年的争论误当成共识。适合需要追溯决策、检查逾期事项、识别相互冲突结论的场景。
